item.title: Home
item.description: Haocheng Liu # Home # I am a PhD Track candidate at IP Paris , and am in M1 Mathématiques Jacques Hadamard at École Polytechnique. I was Research Interests # Machine learning & Signal Processing Source Separation Optimal transport Applications Music & Acoustic Signals Experience # Lorem markdownum emicat gestu. Cannis sol pressit ducta. Est Idaei, tremens ausim se tutaeque, illi ulnis hausit, sed, lumina cutem. Quae avis sequens!
